title: eriogonum racemosum var. zionis
intro: Eriogonum racemosum var. zionis, also known as Zion Buckwheat, is a rare and endemic species of flowering plant in the buckwheat family. It is known to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce pain, improve wound healing, and provide protection against infections. Eriogonum racemosum var. zionis can be used to make herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
